name: Week 7 Pull — Form Check (Back/Biceps)
description: Form Check Week. Less yanking, more static control. W6 pull-ups hit 36 clean — keep the clean-only rule. DB rows hit 80x7 PR but form changed; keep 80 as top set with strict form. NEW: chest supported DB row as strict accessory, high cable bicep curl replaces cable curl, cable crunch added as true finisher.

exercises.notes: W6: 10/10/9/7 = 36 clean. The clean-only rule is working. Form check week: controlled descent, no kipping, full dead hang at bottom. Don't chase 10 on every set — 8 strict beats 10 sloppy.
15/side. W6: 9/9/8 + drop. Stay at 15/side — form check week means no bumping. Full ROM, slow negative, no cheating the bottom.
Pyramid: 60x10, 70x8, 80x7 (strict form). W6: 80x7 PR but had to brace everything. Form check week: 80 stays as top set but zero momentum. Brace core, pull to hip, squeeze at top, slow lower.

sets.name: Station 2: Chest Supported Row + Lat Pulldown

exercises.notes: NEW. 40-50lb. No momentum possible — the bench does the work of keeping you honest. Squeeze at top, 2-second negative. Start at 40, go to 50 if 40 is easy.
170 (up from 160). Back left machine. Wide grip near the bend. W6: 160x12 x3 clean. Form check: lean back slightly, pull to chest not behind neck, hold the squeeze 1 second.
130 (120+10 add-on). Back right machine. Upright posture, slower tempo. W6: form is the progression now. 2-second concentric, 1-second hold, 2-second eccentric. No leaning back.
50 (back from 57.5). W6: 57.5x15 form broke down. Form check week: 50x20 all clean. External rotate at the top, elbows high, hold 1 second. If 20 is easy, stay — the point is perfect reps.
25lb. W6: form breaks last 2 reps. Form check week: if you can only do 13 strict, stop at 13. Seated bent-over, slow squeeze, no swinging.

sets.name: Finisher: High Cable Curl + Cable Crunch

exercises.notes: NEW — replaces cable-bicep-curl. Seated at lat pulldown, two handles, curl down. Find your working weight this week. Start light (30-40), slow and strict. Biceps are pre-fatigued from preacher so go lighter than ego says.
NEW — true finisher. Find working number this week. Kneel facing away from cable, crunch down. Keep hips locked — movement comes from abs, not hip flexors. Start around 50-60, adjust.

tips: FORM CHECK WEEK: every rep should be textbook. If form breaks, stop the set. Less yanking, more static control.
Pull-ups: 36 clean last week was great. Don't force 10 on every set — 8 strict is the priority.
DB row 80lb stays but zero momentum. The chest supported row afterward will expose any cheating habits.
Chest supported DB row is NEW: the bench removes all body english. Start at 40lb, find your honest number.
Face pull dropped back to 50x20 on purpose. 57.5 broke form — own 50 with perfect external rotation.
High cable bicep curl is NEW: seated at lat pulldown with two handles. Find your weight — biceps are already cooked from preacher.
Cable crunch is NEW: abs finisher on the cable column. Keep hips locked, crunch from the abs only.
Both finishers are on the cable column — no moving between stations. Efficient.
Rest: 2.5 min pull-ups, 2 min stations 1-2, 90s station 3, 75s station 4, 60s finisher
